[https://www.iqoo.com/ iQOO] |mode=squads |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=20,000,000 |perspective=tpp |country=India |sdate=2022-05-19 |edate=2022-06-12 |web=https://esports.battlegroundsmobileindia.com/ |facebook=BattlegroundsMobileIN |discord=p2U2ebfHJC |youtube=channel/UCe31NPEeRGO0hcznx6Tdb-g |youtube2=channel/UCugG6-k5QGbq_iDEPAnG4NQ |loco=streamers/BATTLEGROUNDS_MOBILE_INDIA |instagram=battlegroundsmobilein_official |next=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Pro_Series/2023{{!}}2023 }} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Spero |b2=Ocean Sharma |b3=AnkiiiBOT |b4=Mazy }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |lang=English |b1=Fyxs |b2=Arka |b3=Experiment }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Pro Series Season 1:''' May 19th - June 12th, 2022 * '''''League Stage:''' May 19th - June 5th ** '''Squad {{Abbr/TPP}}:''' 24 Teams. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|''24 teams''}} from [[Battlegrounds Mobile India Open Challenge/2022|BMOC 2022]] ** 3 weeks of League Stage - 24 teams are split into 3 groups. *** Total 24 matches each week - 6 matches per day. *** Each team play 4 matches per day in a ''Round-Robin Format'', to a total of 16 matches per week. ** {{bgcolortext|up|'''''Top 16 teams'''''}} advance to '''Finals'''. * '''''Grand Finals:''' June 9th - 12th ** '''Squad {{Abbr/TPP}}''': Top 16 of '''League'''. ** 24 Matches total, 6 matches each day. {{box|start|padding=4em}} ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" !
